thirdPartyAndPrivateLimitations: The suggestion form and donation destination were validated for reachability and client-side validation without transmitting a form or money.
Psalms chart summaries and Sanctuary/Parables visual canvases have equivalent accessible controls; the redundant visual picking surfaces are not separate keyboard targets.
Psalms selections are session state rather than bookmarkable URL states.
The private James overlap corpus was unavailable; public content, citations, references, theology, and deploy artifacts passed, and no private evidence was exposed.
The private Romans source mapping was available and passed agreement validation.
